title: Authentication System
description: Implement complete authentication flow including email/password registration, login, logout, and session management using NextAuth.js or similar. Create protected route middleware for API and pages. Implement password hashing, JWT or session-based auth, and auth context for client components. Build auth UI pages: sign up, sign in, forgot password flow. Include subscription tier field in user creation (defaulting to 'free'). Out of scope: OAuth providers, subscription billing, password reset email sending (mock it).
